text:
Market today: The mood is choppy, with oil hitting a two-month high driven by geopolitical tensions. This is a major headwind for your tech-heavy, leveraged book.

Your holdings: SOXL is down -38.49% and SPAL is down -53.12%. Both are leveraged ETFs and decay is a killer, especially on margin. SPY, QQQI, QQQ, SMH are all showing losses and are marked for SELL or TRIM.

Watch: Keep an eye on oil prices and any news related to the semiconductor sector.

Bottom line: Your leveraged tech bets are getting hit hard by macro headwinds; focus on managing risk.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming if it breaks below recent lows; its decay is amplified by margin calls.
SPAL: Monitor closely; its leveraged nature makes it highly susceptible to further drawdowns.
No new buys today - hold and watch
